release: Sprint 13 prod promote — BrightSignals notifications + BrightRoutines scheduler
ticket: BH-409 / BH-876 (parent epics); secret wiring precedent BH-1063
status: COMPLETE — all 4 secrets written and verified across all targets as of 2026-07-21. See per-secret snapshot subfolders for detail.
protocol: Mutation Protocol in ../../README.md — LastPass first, snapshot before/after, read-modify-write, commit INDEX.json only, never raw payloads

secrets.name: NOTIFICATIONS_API_KEY

targets.consumed_by: platform-core notifications-service-key.ts (bare process.env read — NOT in src/common/env-vars.ts zod schema)
.github/workflows/deploy.yml -> scripts/sync-pulumi-config.sh -> Pulumi config -> ECS task env

secrets.gap_flagged: platform-core has no declared required-secret manifest for this key — env-vars.ts zod schema does not include it. Recommend adding before this release, see 'System gaps' below.

secrets.incident_note: This exact secret was involved in the 2026-07-13 incident (see ../../../../CLAUDE.md 'NEVER touch secrets' rule + memory/feedback_never_modify_env_vars.md) — generated + set without named confirmation off an ambiguous 'fix that' reply. Extra care required: confirm exact value/generation method by name before any write.

secrets.name: SCHEDULER_WEBHOOK_SECRET

targets.consumed_by: platform-core scheduler-bridge.ts (bare process.env read — NOT in zod schema)
brightbot bare env read, no manifest

approval_gate.rule_source: ../../../../CLAUDE.md 'NEVER touch secrets/credentials without a separate, explicit, named confirmation'
required_before_any_write: State exact value or exact generation method
Wait for user to confirm THAT SPECIFIC action by name — a general 'ok go' does not count
approval_gate.approved_by: user, per-secret, in-conversation on 2026-07-21 — NOTIFICATIONS_API_KEY and SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET each confirmed individually by name before write; SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY confirmed with 'yes 100% permission' after the exact 3-target plan (AWS+GitHub+LangGraph) was stated; SCHEDULER_WEBHOOK_SECRET batched into the same LangGraph PATCH call as SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY under the same confirmation.

system_gaps_identified_this_release: platform-core src/common/env-vars.ts zod schema is missing NOTIFICATIONS_API_KEY, SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY, SCHEDULER_WEBHOOK_SECRET — only SLACK_CONNECT_INTERNAL_SECRET is declared. Recommend adding a REQUIRED_SECRET_ENV_VARS list mirroring brightbot-slack-server's infrastructure/index.ts pattern.
brightbot has no required-secrets manifest at all — reads via bare os.environ.get with no startup validation.

No single tool today fans out a snapshot across all 3 surfaces (AWS Secrets Manager, GitHub Actions secrets, LangGraph Cloud deployment env) for one secret name — this INDEX.json is the manual bridge until that's automated.
